scripts.analyzer:start: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\run-python.ps1 -m uvicorn app:app --app-dir python-service --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --workers 4
scripts.scan:taohuawu-major: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\run-python.ps1 scripts\scan-piece-segments.py --piece-id taohuawu-test-fragment --audio data/test_audio_mix.mp3 --output-dir data/piece-segment-scan/taohuawu-major --max-candidates-per-section 3 --hint-radius 1 --hint-step 1 --window-padding 3
scripts.scan:taohuawu-whole: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\run-python.ps1 scripts\scan-piece-segments.py --piece-id taohuawu-test-fragment --audio data/test_audio_mix.mp3 --output-dir data/piece-segment-scan/taohuawu-whole --max-candidates-per-section 2 --hint-radius 1 --hint-step 1 --window-padding 3
scripts.evaluate:taohuawu-whole: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\run-python.ps1 scripts\run-piece-pass.py --piece-id taohuawu-test-fragment --audio data/test_audio_mix.mp3 --output-dir data/piece-pass/taohuawu-whole --max-candidates-per-section 2 --hint-radius 1 --hint-step 1 --window-padding 3
